creator: tech-lists@zyxst.net
text:
Created attachment 231018
log from poudriere testport

Hi,

This is failing again with poudriere testport -j 13S-localhost -J1 -i -c devel/e2fsprogs-libss.
This is with a frest ports tree as of a few minutes ago and the poudriere jail is new:
13.0-STABLE 1300523 1a86aab86     amd64 git+https 2022-01-14 14:13:18

I've attached the full log.
